name: vpsops
description: Explicit-use workflow for real VPS setup, relays, client delivery, monitoring, auditing, and maintenance.

interface.longDescription: An explicitly invoked workflow for safe real-server access, deployments, local proxy clients, optional relay topologies, monitoring, and repeatable health audits.
defaultPrompt: Use $vpsops to securely bootstrap my new VPS.
Use $vpsops to audit this VPS without changing it.
Use $vpsops to design an optional relay and landing topology.
